executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Going all-in on Agentic SOC — AI agents that execute security operations autonomously, not just advise
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: LimaCharlie is positioning as the infrastructure layer for AI-driven security operations. Their Agentic SOC-as-Code approach provides deployment models (Baselining, Lean, Tiered) for customers to right-size AI involvement. AI agents can now configure tenants, suppress false positives, analyze MITRE coverage, and onboard cloud environments. They're benchmarking frontier models for SOC tasks.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: Platform-first approach continues. Detection-native case management launched. Git Sync for version-controlled configs. Multi-cloud onboarding automation. The ecosystem IS the product — API-first with AI agent governance.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: Targeting MSSPs and security teams ready for AI-automated operations. Agentic SecOps Workspace for teams wanting AI agents doing SOC work, not just augmenting analysts.
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Pure usage-based maintained: $3/sensor/month, $0.20/GB telemetry, free outputs to GCS. Two free sensors for community. AI capabilities added at same price point — competing on capability density.

engineering_capacity.velocity_assessment: Very high — shipping agentic AI capabilities at startup speed. Case management, multiple agentic workflows, MITRE analysis, multi-cloud onboarding all in one quarter. Small team punching above weight.

key_items: MITRE ATT&CK coverage analysis via AI
Threat intelligence to live detections pipeline
Git Sync for configuration version control

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Small team (<50). Blog output suggests heavy engineering focus. Likely hiring AI/ML engineers given agentic pivot. Developer-led growth, no visible sales expansion.
intelligence_signals.target_users: MSSPs wanting AI-augmented SOC services, security-mature enterprises building custom SecOps, detection engineers wanting programmable security infrastructure
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Usage-based ($3/sensor, $0.20/GB) with MSSP white-label model. Revenue scales with customer sensor growth. AI capabilities at no extra cost — moat through capability density at low price.
intelligence_signals.differentiators: Only platform offering Agentic SOC-as-Code with deployment models. AI agents execute operations, not just recommend. Infrastructure-level approach for differentiated security offerings. Transparent usage-based pricing.

gaps_exposed: Securin has no agentic AI automation for security operations
No SOC-as-Code or programmable security infrastructure
areas_of_focus: Watch Agentic SOC trend — may reshape how customers consume security platforms
Consider LimaCharlie as integration partner (telemetry source for Securin analysis)
Evaluate adding AI automation to platform operations (auto-triage, auto-prioritize)
API-first architecture investment needed for agentic workflows

product_specific.APT: Threat-intel-to-live-detection pipeline could compete with APT if they build analysis layers. Currently complementary.
product_specific.Platform: Agentic SOC-as-Code sets a new bar for platform sophistication that Securin admin features should aspire toward.
